entry.title: New: CR 24-114 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending the following: 1. FIRST READING of Bill 166, CD1 (2024), to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget by: 1) amending Section 2, Estimated Revenues, by increasing Bond/Lapsed Bond by $14,100,000; 2) amending Section 3.B.11.c., Department of Management, Office of Recovery Program, by adding conditional language to require up to $100,000 to be used for Haleakala Waldorf School for land management and watershed restoration; 3) amending Section 4.C., Department of Management, by adding an appropriation for the Makawao-Pukalani-Kula Community Plan Area, Other Projects, Bond Fund, entitled “Von Tempsky Kula Property Acquisition” in the amount of $14,100,000; 4) adjusting the totals accordingly; and 5) amending Appendix C - Capital Improvement Projects, Department of Management, by adding a project and project description for the Makawao-Pukalani-Kula Community Plan Area entitled “Von Tempsky Kula Property Acquisition” for approximately 273 acres, located at tax map key (2) 2-3-001:023, in the amount of $14,100,000; and 2. FIRST READING of Bill 167, CD1 (2024), to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 general obligation bond authorization ordinance by adding an appropriation for the Department of Management, Makawao-Pukalani-Kula Community Plan Area, Other Projects, entitled “Von Tempsky Kula Property Acquisition,” in the amount of $14,100,000.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
